description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes C/C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push to main, on pull requests to main (ignoring certain paths), and weekly. It should use a windows-latest job with read permissions, checking out the repository, installing Ninja, setting up the MSVC dev environment, initializing CodeQL for C/C++, configuring CMake, building with CMake, and then performing a CodeQL analysis.
